positive: A cosmic nebula viewed through a stylized art deco lens, featuring geometric representations of celestial bodies, swirling magenta, deep indigo, and electric teal clouds. The composition is centered, showcasing a massive, luminous ring structure intersecting a cluster of abstract, bioluminescent starbursts. Highly detailed, clean vector style, strong silhouettes, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, suitable for t-shirt screen printing, UHD, symmetrical composition, clean lines, minimalist cosmic energy.
